title: Paint It, Black

earnings.assumptions: The headline range is treated as artist-side participation, with gross track, label, publishing, and writer lanes modeled from classic-rock streaming, playlist, and sync demand.

ownership.master_owner: ABKCO-controlled Rolling Stones 1960s master in current digital catalog availability.
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer-side value is modeled separately because Jagger/Richards songwriting participation is central to the composition.
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled.
ownership.notes: The estimate keeps master, artist-side, and publishing lanes separate because the song sits in the band's ABKCO-era catalog.

meaning_summary: Its dark hook and immediate recognizability make it unusually durable in both catalog listening and sync-heavy reuse.
revenue_drivers: Classic-rock playlists support steady recurring streaming.
Heavy sync potential keeps the track active beyond baseline listening.
